{{Quote|He's not your ordinary droid.|[[Uldir Lochett]]|<ref name="Emissary of the Void">"[[Emissary of the Void]]"</ref>}}
The astromech droid '''UV-002''' (or '''Uvee''') was attached to the rescue starship ''[[No Luck Required]]'' during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He had been reprogrammed to be capable of flying the ship in emergencies, and in the messages he could flash up on the ship's displays, he had picked up first mate [[Vega Sepen]]'s habit of referring to captain [[Uldir Lochett]] as "Boss-boy".

{{Char-stub}}
